aleabit.layer_label: HTS superconducting induction heating + LED + defense optoelectronics
aleabit.verdict_label: SOE with HTS superconducting + defense optronics mix
aleabit.thesis: Jiangxi SOE diversified across LEDs, defense optoelectronics, and notably HTS (high-temp superconducting) induction heating. Defense angle is real; HTS magnet capability is a longer-dated bottleneck claim. SOE structure dilutes the signal but the technical depth is uncommon.
